data.body: Reopened + amended to commit 6b96fd3d (Change-Id Iaf7d6fde) to complete E2E test coverage per code review. tests/unit/test_sync_remote_config.py now 23 tests: every one of the 5 threaded sites has dedicated alternate-remote coverage against a bare remote NAMED 'github' (not origin) — push (git-args spy + real E2E via env AND config-file), fsck _push_pending (notice names github/tickets + ahead count), sync reconverge (ff-adopts from github), init _mount_or_create_branch (attaches to github/tickets), materialize_tickets (resolves github/tickets ref). All 23 pass; ruff+format+mypy clean. No src change since the verified impl — test coverage only.
